scripts.backend:dev: pnpm run shared:build && pnpm -C backend dev
scripts.frontend:dev: pnpm run shared:build && pnpm -C frontend dev
scripts.setup:project: pnpm install && pnpm run shared:build && pnpm -C backend prisma:generate && pnpm run db:up && sleep 3 && pnpm -C backend prisma:migrate && pnpm -C backend seed
scripts.lint: biome check frontend --config-path=frontend/biome.json && biome check backend --config-path=backend/biome.json && biome check shared --config-path=biome.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write frontend --config-path=frontend/biome.json && biome check --write backend --config-path=backend/biome.json && biome check --write shared --config-path=biome.json
scripts.format: biome format --write frontend --config-path=frontend/biome.json && biome format --write backend --config-path=backend/biome.json && biome format --write shared --config-path=biome.json
scripts.test: pnpm -C frontend test && pnpm -C backend test
